visual_description:
The audio opens with a loud, echoing gunshot, immediately followed by a high-pitched, piercing alarm that creates a sense of immediate danger and high alert. A medium shot shows three men standing in a dimly lit, narrow corridor, possibly a shop aisle. The man in the center, who appears to be older, wears a light-colored blazer over a blue shirt. He has a serious expression. On either side of him, two younger men in patterned, short-sleeved shirts look on with concerned expressions. The man on the left is bald, and the man on the right has dark hair. The background is filled with shelves stocked with various items, suggesting a convenience store or market. The lighting is cool and has a greenish-blue tint. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The camera is shaky, suggesting a tense or chaotic moment. A tense, dramatic, and fast-paced orchestral score begins, dominated by urgent strings that build a feeling of suspense and action.

The camera cuts to a medium shot of a bald man in a dark suit standing in the same dimly lit corridor. He is pointing a handgun directly at the camera with a determined look. To his left, a sign with
